item.minecraft.warden_spawn_egg.jei.desc:
[Warden]
An extremely dangerous creature that typically lurks within the Ancient Cities of the Deep Dark.

§eReward Boost:§r
1. §bXP Increase§r: Now drops §a275§r experience points when killed by a player or a tamed wolf (was 5).
2. §bRare Drop§r: If a player deals more than §c50%§r of its max health as damage, it has a §a10%§r chance to drop a §6Soulbound§r enchanted book (affected by Looting, +2.5% per level).

§7Tip: Even with the increased reward, it remains highly dangerous. Prepare thoroughly before engaging.§r
item.tuanzis_mod.immortal_talisman.toolt: Retain all items and experience on death while in inventory.
item.tuanzis_mod.yuris_revenge.jei.descr:
[Yuri's Revenge]
A tool imbued with mysterious power, capable of shattering indestructible bedrock at unprecedented speeds.

§eFeatures:§r
1. §bBedrock Breaker§r: The only tool that can mine and drop bedrock.
2. §bExtreme Speed§r: Amazing destruction speed when facing bedrock.

§7Note: It is nearly useless against any block other than bedrock.§r
jei.tuanzis_mod.berserker.description:
[Berserker Enchantment]
Convert your near-death crisis into a devastating counter-attack.

§eFeatures:§r
1. §bDesperate Rage§r: When wearing the enchanted chestplate, melee attack damage is boosted based on the proportion of lost health. For every 10% max health lost, melee damage increases by §a5% (Level I)§r or §a8% (Level II)§r. The boost reaches its cap when health falls below §c5%§r.
2. §bReal-time Adjustment§r: When health is restored by healing, the damage bonus decreases in real-time.

§eCost & Penalties:§r
1. §bArmor Collapse§r: As a penalty, the chestplate's base armor value is reduced by §c35% (Level I)§r or §c30% (Level II)§r (meaning the chestplate still retains 65% or 70% of its base armor value. For example, a Diamond Chestplate with 8 base armor will only lose 2 points under Level II, still providing 6 armor points, instead of being reduced to only 30%).
2. §bExclusion§r: Mutually exclusive with all protection enchantments including §bProtection§r, §bFire Protection§r, §bBlast Protection§r, §bProjectile Protection§r, and §bFeather Falling§r.

§7Acquisition: Max level II. Obtainable via Enchanting Table (rare), random loot, or Villager trades.§r
jei.tuanzis_mod.chain_mining.description:
[Chain Mining Enchantment]
Hold the activation key while mining a block to instantly mine surrounding connected blocks of the same type.

§eFeatures:§r
1. §bVein Mining§r: Break a block to automatically break connected identical blocks and drop items normally.
2. §bMining Limits§r: Level I mines up to 16 blocks, Level II up to 32, Level III up to 48, Level IV up to 64.

§eConstraints & Penalties:§r
1. §bDurability Cost§r: Each mined block consumes tool durability normally. If the tool breaks during chain mining, the chain will immediately and safely stop.
2. §bHunger Cost§r: Each extra block mined adds §c0.25§r exhaustion. The exhaustion is accumulated and applied instantly to deduct your saturation and food level.

§7Acquisition: Currently unavailable in survival mode; obtain via Creative Mode only.§r
jei.tuanzis_mod.compatibility.infinity_m:
[Enchantment Compatibility]
§bInfinity§r and §bMending§r are now compatible and can be applied to the same bow simultaneously.
jei.tuanzis_mod.decoy_totem.description:
[Decoy Totem]
An extremely powerful strategic defense tool. Perfect for drawing enemy attention, creating safe windows for combat or escape.

§eEffects & Mechanics:§r
1. §bPhantom Spawn§r: Generates a player phantom lasting §e15 seconds§r, drawing agro from all mobs within §a10 blocks§r.
2. §bPerfect Disguise§r: The phantom looks exactly like the player (skin, armor, and held items).
3. §bData Inheritance§r: Inherits player's health and armor value at the moment of spawn.
4. §bLifelike Behavior§r: Randomly walks, runs, and jumps. Upon taking damage, it instantly panics and sprints away with big jumps, fleeing the damage source!
5. §bShatter Revenge§r: Drops nothing on death but shatters with a clay pot sound. It enrages mobs within §a10 blocks§r, granting them §cSpeed II§r for §e10 seconds§r.

§eAcquisition:§r
1. §bShaped Crafting§r: Top [Empty, Sculk Vein, Empty], Middle [Phantom Membrane, Scarecrow, Phantom Membrane], Bottom [Glowstone, Redstone, Glowstone].

§7Note: Spawning triggers a §c15-second§r item cooldown.
jei.tuanzis_mod.echo_breaker.description:
[Echo Breaker]
An ultimate defensive weapon forged using a Warden Heart and Echo Shards. It holds the mysterious power to resist and even deflect sonic damage.

§ePassive Effects:§r
1. §bSonic Absorption:§r Effective only when held in the main hand. Automatically §areduces Sonic Boom damage by 30%§r.

§eActive Effects (Right-click):§r
1. §bRestrictions:§r Right-click block can only be used when the §coffhand is empty§r.
2. §bPerfect Block:§r Right-click to block for §e0.5 seconds§r. During blocking, grants §a100% immunity to Sonic Boom damage§r.
3. §bSonic Deflection:§r Blocking a Sonic Boom perfectly deflects the sound wave back to its source, dealing §c15 true damage§r and applying §9strong knockback§r.
4. §bDurability Cost:§r Each successful block consumes an extra §c3 durability points§r.
5. §bCooldown Mechanics:§r Triggers a §c5.0-second§r cooldown on §cfailure§r (no damage blocked); triggers an §a8.0-second§r cooldown on §asuccess§r (perfectly deflected).

§eRepair & Maintenance:§r
Can be repaired in an anvil using a §bWarden Heart§r.
jei.tuanzis_mod.experience.description:
[Experience Enchantment]
Increases the experience points gained from killing mobs.

§eEffects:§r
1. §bXP Boost§r: Each level increases experience gain by §a25%§r (rounded up).
2. §bCondition§r: Only effective when killing mobs with the enchanted weapon in the main hand.
3. §bScope§r: Effective against all mobs except players.

§7Note: Max level is 4. Level 30 enchantment table can yield up to level 3. Level 4 requires anvil merging or special loot.§r
jei.tuanzis_mod.immortal_talisman.descri:
[Immortal Talisman]
A life-saving artifact. As long as it's in your inventory, death is no longer the end.

§eEffects:§r
1. §bKeep Inventory§r: Retain all items, armor, and experience upon death.
2. §bSelf-Sacrifice§r: One talisman is consumed each time it saves you.

§cWarning: If all talismans are consumed, death protection will fail!§r
jei.tuanzis_mod.rainbow_sponge.descripti:
[Rainbow Sponge: Advanced Customization Guide]
The sponge acts as a 'Command Card'. Program it via Anvil naming, then merge with an item to apply styles.

§n1. Programming Syntax (Naming)§r
1. §bHex Colors§r: '#RRGGBB' (e.g. #FF5555). [Cost: 8]
2. §bVanilla Styles§r: '&L' (e.g. &l Bold, &o Italic). [Cost: +4 per code]
3. §bSplitting System§r: Use ',' (e.g. &c,&b). Styles apply char-by-char. [Cost: +2 per ',']
4. §bSmart Gradient§r: '&qN#Start-#End'. N=Length. End optional. Smooth shift. [Cost: 8 per char]
§7Note: Gradient codes (&q) show plain text; others show real color as demo.§r

§n2. Applying Styles (Merging)§r
1. §eNormal/Style Merge§r: 32 base + (Styles*16 + Commas*8).
2. §eGradient Merge§r: 32 per character.
3. §eReset Styles§r: Merge '&r' sponge to clear item's custom colors. [Cost: 16]
jei.tuanzis_mod.scarecrow.description:
[Scarecrow]
A decorative item, also serving as the core component to craft the advanced defensive item — §bDecoy Totem§r.

§eAcquisition:§r
1. §bShapeless Crafting§r: Crafted using 1 Hay Block, 1 Stick, and 1 Carved Pumpkin.
jei.tuanzis_mod.smelting.description:
[Smelting Enchantment]
Skip the hassle of returning home to use a furnace. When mining blocks that can be smelted, it directly drops the smelted result.

§eFeatures:§r
1. §bAuto-Smelt§r: Directly drops products when mining ores, logs, or other smeltable blocks.
2. §bFull Compatibility§r: Perfectly compatible with §bFortune§r, allowing for increased drops.

§eConstraints & Penalties:§r
1. §bMutual Exclusion§r: Incompatible with §bSilk Touch§r.
2. §bDurability Cost§r: Each smeltable block mined consumes §c1§r extra durability (total 2).

§7Acquisition: Cannot be obtained from the enchantment table. A "Treasure Enchantment" found only in Nether Fortress/Desert Temple chests or through high-level Librarian trades (rare, 40-64 emeralds).
jei.tuanzis_mod.trial_dummy.description:
[Trial Dummy]
A highly specialized helper tool used for testing damage output and DPS.

§eRules:§r
1. §bPlacement§r: Right-click to place on a solid block. Max 1 per player within a 10-block radius (placing a 2nd instantly recovers the 1st without durability loss).
2. §bRecovery§r: Shift + Right-click with empty hand to recover. Consumes 1 durability. Drop rate on zero durability: 0-2 sticks and 1 hay block. All worn armors safely drop on recovery!
3. §bInvulnerability & Armor Inheritance§r: Immune to all environment damages (except Creative Player instant break). Right-click with any armor/weapon to swap and dress it. The dummy inherits all armor values, toughness, protection enchantments, and active effects to simulate a 100% real combat defense!
4. §bWeapon & Projectile Protection§r: Attacking doesn't consume weapon durability or arrows.
5. §bDPS Testing§r: Floating damage indicators, action bar real-time stats (Total Damage | DPS). Auto-archive on 4s idle. Right-click with empty hand to print ultra-detailed statistics in chat!
jei.tuanzis_mod.warden_heart.description:
[Warden Heart]
A core material obtained from defeating the Warden, containing its resilient life force and sonic energy.

§eAcquisition:§r
1. §bRare Drop:§r Defeating a Warden has a §a25%§r chance to drop it (affected by Looting, +10% probability per level).

§eUsage:§r
1. §bCrafting Ingredient:§r Combine with 3 §bEcho Shards§r and 1 §bStick§r to craft the powerful defensive weapon — §6Echo Breaker§r.
2. §bEquipment Repair:§r Can be used to repair the §6Echo Breaker§r in an anvil.
message.tuanzis_mod.trial_dummy.no_tests: §6[Trial Dummy] No testing data found. Strike the dummy to start.
message.tuanzis_mod.trial_dummy.reset: §c[Trial Dummy] Session ended. DPS stats archived and reset.
